title: calliandra hirtiflora var. hirtiflora
intro: Calliandra hirtiflora var. hirtiflora, also known as pink powder puff or powder puff tree, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calliandra hirtiflora var. hirtiflora include its potential to alleviate fever, wounds, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and bark are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
